name: Profane Burst Crystal
description: This black iron weapon is decorated with dozens of silver skulls. Runic phrases describing vile acts run along its blade or haft and glow when it is wielded. A profane burst weapon functions as a profane weapon. In addition, the weapon explodes with negative energy on a successful critical hit, dealing extra negative energy damage. Critical ×2: 1d10 (+2d10 good outsider). ×3: 2d10 (+4d10). ×4: 3d10 (+6d10). This burst does not harm you or any creature other than the target if you are undead; otherwise, you take 1d4 points of Constitution damage. This is a continuous effect and requires no activation. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A dozen-skull adorned weapon augmentation crystal.
